stimulus: Granville T. Woods was a prolific African American inventor known for his contributions to railroad and telecommunications technology. Between 1884 and 1907, he patented many devices, ______blank an induction telegraph, an improved air brake, and—most famously—a third-rail electric streetcar system.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. The present participle “including” correctly forms a participial phrase that supplements the main clause “he patented many devices,” identifying some of those devices.

Choice A (past tense) and Choice B (present singular) would each create a comma splice. Choice D (future) doesn’t match the past time frame.
